scripts.build: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && next build
scripts.dev: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && next dev
scripts.dev:compose: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.lint: pnpm lint:styles && pnpm --dir ../.. exec oxlint apps/web/src apps/web/test
scripts.test: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec jest --config apps/web/jest.config.ts --runInBand
scripts.typecheck: pnpm contract:build && pnpm logger:build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsc --project apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
